name: chunk
description: The standalone lodash.chunk package as a vendorable file. Useful when you want a familiar chunking helper without another npm dependency.
summary: This page ships the published lodash.chunk file in both raw and normalized forms. The value is to keep a known chunking helper local instead of rewriting it each time or adding another dependency.
nativeAlternative: A small loop can chunk arrays, but vendoring the existing lodash helper is often simpler when you want to preserve current behavior and call sites.

variants.label: Normalized
variants.note: Rule-based normalization for modern TS projects. The goal is easier import and build compatibility, not changed behavior.

variants.label: Raw
variants.note: Published package file kept as-is for older teams or repos that still prefer the original CommonJS distribution.

note: Raw and normalized views are both available. Use normalized when you want an ESM and TypeScript-friendly file, and raw when you want the original published package shape.
